'''tohalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulnometacarpal|ulnometacarpal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulnometacarpal|ulnometacarpal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tohalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tohalithi|tohalithi]] || [[word:tohaliji|tohaliji]] || [[word:tohalishi|tohalishi]] || [[word:tohaliki|tohaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tohaluthuthu|tohaluthuthu]] || [[word:tohalujuju|tohalujuju]] || [[word:tohalushushu|tohalushushu]] || [[word:tohalukuku|tohalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tohaluthu|tohaluthu]] || [[word:tohaluju|tohaluju]] || [[word:tohalushu|tohalushu]] || [[word:tohaluku|tohaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tohalufthuf|tohalufthuf]] || [[word:tohalufjuf|tohalufjuf]] || [[word:tohalufshuf|tohalufshuf]] || [[word:tohalufkuf|tohalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tohalethe|tohalethe]] || [[word:tohaleje|tohaleje]] || [[word:tohaleshe|tohaleshe]] || [[word:tohaleke|tohaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tohalothotho|tohalothotho]] || [[word:tohalojojo|tohalojojo]] || [[word:tohaloshosho|tohaloshosho]] || [[word:tohalokoko|tohalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tohalotho|tohalotho]] || [[word:tohalojo|tohalojo]] || [[word:tohalosho|tohalosho]] || [[word:tohaloko|tohaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tohalofthof|tohalofthof]] || [[word:tohalofjof|tohalofjof]] || [[word:tohalofshof|tohalofshof]] || [[word:tohalofkof|tohalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfthÃŸf|tohalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfjÃŸf|tohalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfshÃŸf|tohalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfkÃŸf|tohalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|tohalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|tohalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|tohalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|tohalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfthÃŸf|tohalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfjÃŸf|tohalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfshÃŸf|tohalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfkÃŸf|tohalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfthÃŸf|tohalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfjÃŸf|tohalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfshÃŸf|tohalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tohalÃŸfkÃŸf|tohalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tohalÃḊthÃḊ|tohalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:tohalÃḊjÃḊ|tohalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:tohalÃḊshÃḊ|tohalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:tohalÃḊkÃḊ|tohalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tohalathatha|tohalathatha]] || [[word:tohalajaja|tohalajaja]] || [[word:tohalashasha|tohalashasha]] || [[word:tohalakaka|tohalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tohalatha|tohalatha]] || [[word:tohalaja|tohalaja]] || [[word:tohalasha|tohalasha]] || [[word:tohalaka|tohalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tohalafthaf|tohalafthaf]] || [[word:tohalafjaf|tohalafjaf]] || [[word:tohalafshaf|tohalafshaf]] || [[word:tohalafkaf|tohalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tohalasha|tohalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tohalshÃḋasha|tohalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tohalroasha|tohalroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tohalmuasha|tohalmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tohalyaasha|tohalyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotohalnkshÃḋasha|gotohalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotohalnkroasha|gotohalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotohalnkmuasha|gotohalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotohalnkyaasha|gotohalnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tohahalasha|tohahalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tohahalshÃḋasha|tohahalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tohahalroasha|tohahalroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tohahalmuasha|tohahalmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tohahalyaasha|tohahalyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotohahalnkshÃḋasha|gotohahalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotohahalnkroasha|gotohahalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotohahalnkmuasha|gotohahalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotohahalnkyaasha|gotohahalnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tehÃḊlasha|tehÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tehÃḊlshÃḋasha|tehÃḊlshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tehÃḊlroasha|tehÃḊlroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tehÃḊlmuasha|tehÃḊlmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tehÃḊlyaasha|tehÃḊlyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotehÃḊlnkshÃḋasha|gotehÃḊlnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotehÃḊlnkroasha|gotehÃḊlnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotehÃḊlnkmuasha|gotehÃḊlnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotehÃḊlnkyaasha|gotehÃḊlnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tohfalasha|tohfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tohfalshÃḋasha|tohfalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tohfalroasha|tohfalroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tohfalmuasha|tohfalmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tohfalyaasha|tohfalyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotohfalnkshÃḋasha|gotohfalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotohfalnkroasha|gotohfalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotohfalnkmuasha|gotohfalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotohfalnkyaasha|gotohfalnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
